description_text: Store Categories UK Car Front lip Rear lip Side lip Fender Rear Tail Wing Roof Cross Bar Cargo Bag Steering Wheel Cover Car Cover Accessories Car Light Kit Seat Covers Cargo Net Car Antenna Car Floor Mats Car Resonator Sound Deadening Mat Exhaust Pipe Rim Cover UK Motorcycle mirror Seat Tail lights Decorative Light Hand Grip Turn Lights Windshield Hand Guard Headlight Highway Foot Pegs Handlebar Tube License Plate Bracket Other Parts Motorcycle Cover Payment info Universal Glossy Black Rear Bumper Diffuser Spoiler Splitter 7 Shark Fins Lip Items Description Notice The rear diffuser shark fininstalled at the bottom of the rear bumper of the car, the exhaust pipe cannot be in the middle. If the car model has dual exhaust pipes, the distance between the exhaust pipes should be greater than 82cm. Specification Material: ABS Plastic Colour: Glossy Black Size(LxWxH): 839mm*119mm*38mm/33.03*4.69*1.50 inch Feature Reduce Air Resistance: This shark fin diffuser designed to increase a vehicle's aerodynamic performance.Reduces car's drag about 1.6% and increases down force.Reduce the airflow into the bottom, improve the steady of vehicle during fast driving. Excellent Appearance: Shark fin and clean lines design, beautiful appearance, personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look.Give your vehicle a more aggressive racing look. ABS Material: Made of high Quality Polyurethane, waterproof, lightweight but durable, not easy to break. Easy Installation: Install with screws (need drilling holes) or with adhensive double sided tape, but professional installation is still recommend. Package Included 1x Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser 1x Double Sided Adhesive Tape 1 Bag of Screws Shipping Payment Return Policy Feedback About us We usually ship the item within 1 business day after payment clear. (Excluding Weekends and Public Holidays). All shipping including postage and handling fees. We have warehouse in UK, the item will be dispatched from UK warehouse. Delivery to UK typically takes around 2-3 business days. (Except holidays and special circumstances)
